hero.title: Community-led solutions for sustainable development.
description: Collaborate with communities and agencies to create impactful results.
We believe in sustainable development through community-led initiatives and strategic partnerships.

image.alt: Aerial view of a thriving rural Ghanaian community at sunrise

manifesto.title: Development lasts when communities shape the decisions, own the process, and build on what already exists.
paragraphs: Growth Solutions works with communities, agencies, and institutions to design interventions that are practical, locally grounded, and capable of lasting beyond the life of a project.
We believe sustainable development comes from combining participatory methods, technical depth, and strategic partnerships in ways that strengthen local systems instead of bypassing them.

process.title: How we work with communities and partners.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We engage communities to understand their context, resources, and aspirations through participatory methods.

steps.title: Co-Design
steps.description: Together we develop practical solutions that leverage local knowledge and comparative advantages.

steps.title: Implement
steps.description: We support communities to execute initiatives with capacity building, technical assistance, and resource mobilization.

steps.title: Evaluate and Scale
steps.description: We measure impact, harvest learnings, and identify pathways to scale successful interventions.

partners.title: Trusted by partners supporting inclusive and sustainable development.

focusAreas.title: Dedicated to addressing the most pressing challenges through innovative and local solutions.
focusAreas.intro: Our focus areas reflect the systems communities must strengthen to build sustainable futures.

items.title: Organizational Development
items.description: Strengthening the capacity, leadership, and systems of community organizations to improve effectiveness, accountability, and long-term sustainability.

items.title: Energy and Green Transition
items.description: Advancing access to clean, affordable, and renewable energy solutions while supporting communities to adapt to a low-carbon future.

items.title: Governance
items.description: Promoting transparent, participatory, and inclusive governance structures that empower communities to make informed decisions and manage local resources responsibly.

items.title: Livelihood and Local Enterprise
items.description: Supporting communities to identify their comparative advantages, strengthen local enterprise, and create economic opportunities rooted in available resources and practical market pathways.

items.title: Gender and Social Inclusion
items.description: Mainstreaming gender equity and social inclusion across all programs to ensure equal opportunities, representation, and outcomes for marginalized groups.

items.title: Environment
items.description: Supporting sustainable management of natural resources, biodiversity conservation, and climate resilience through community-led environmental stewardship.

featuredProjects.title: Selected work rooted in local realities.
featuredProjects.description: A few examples of how participatory planning, systems support, and local ownership show up in practice.

items.title: Sustainable Fisheries Management Project (SFMP)
items.description: Strengthened Nine (9) Civil Society Organizations in the Fishing Community capacity with Organisational Development solutions in the area of Governance, Financial Management, Human Resource Management Project Management, managing Partnership and External Relationships and leadership, Financial and Strategic Sustainable.

items.title: Developed and implemented Social Public Expenditure & Financial Accountability (SPEFA) in 46 Assemblies
items.description: Enhanced citizen participation and CSO capacity in local government financial accountability.

image.alt: Developed and implemented Social Public Expenditure & Financial Accountability (SPEFA) in 46 Assemblies

items.title: Set up Water & Sanitation Social Enterprise.
items.description: Established local social enterprise for community-managed WASH services.

image.alt: Set up Water & Sanitation Social Enterprise.

impactStatement.title: Measured in stronger organisations, more capable systems, and communities positioned to lead their own progress.
impactStatement.description: Our work supports implementation on the ground while building the planning, governance, and learning structures that make progress durable.

cta.title: Tell me about your next project
cta.description: Bring your challenge, opportunity, or idea and we will explore the right support together.
